text:
I now have comprehensive material across all required source types — UGC hooks, DTC/Meta ad hooks, LinkedIn/social swipe files, and growth frameworks. I'll synthesize these into 45-60 distinct, universal hook formats.

```json
[
  {
    "name": "The Open Loop",
    "family": "Curiosity Gap",
    "trigger": "Unresolved question forces brain to seek closure",
    "template": "What happened when I [DID UNEXPECTED THING] will [SURPRISE YOU]...",
    "why_it_works": "An incomplete information loop compels the viewer to keep watching to resolve the tension.",
    "examples": [
      "I tried this for 30 days and what happened shocked me...",
      "You won't believe what this did to my skin...",
      "The reason this went viral might surprise you...",
      "Watch what happens at the 10-second mark...",
      "There's one detail nobody noticed about this..."
    ],
    "applied_examples": [
      {"vertical": "DTC skincare", "hook": "I used this serum for 14 days and what happened to my pores shocked me..."},
      {"vertical": "productivity app", "hook": "I deleted every other app and what happened to my focus surprised me..."}
    ],
    "source": "https://motionapp.com/blog/best-dtc-meta-ad-hooks-2025"
  },
  {
    "name": "Stop Scrolling If",
    "family": "Callout/Targeting",
    "trigger": "Self-identification halts the scroll reflex",
    "template": "Stop scrolling if you [HAVE PROBLEM / WANT OUTCOME].",
    "why_it_works": "It filters and flags the exact viewer who has the pain, making them feel personally addressed.",
    "examples": [
      "Stop scrolling if you struggle to fall asleep.",
      "Want clear skin? Stop scrolling.",
      "If you suffer with bloating, stop scrolling.",
      "Stop scrolling if you've ever wasted money on supplements.",
      "Don't scroll past this if you're over 30."
    ],
    "applied_examples": [
      {"vertical": "coaching", "hook": "Stop scrolling if you've launched a course and nobody bought."},
      {"vertical": "DTC supplements", "hook": "Stop scrolling if you're always tired by 2pm."}
    ],
    "source": "https://theugcclub.com/hooks-for-ugc-content/"
  },
  {
    "name": "Calling All",
    "family": "Callout/Targeting",
    "trigger": "Direct naming of the tribe creates instant relevance",
    "template": "Calling all [SPECIFIC AUDIENCE] — this one's for you.",
    "why_it_works": "Naming the exact niche makes members feel the message was built specifically for them.",
    "examples": [
      "Calling all busy moms, this one's for you.",
      "Attention everyone with curly hair.",
      "Dear renters: you'll be glad to know this.",
      "Every new founder needs to hear this.",
      "Message for anyone turning 40 this year."
    ],
    "applied_examples": [
      {"vertical": "B2B SaaS", "hook": "Calling all RevOps leads drowning in spreadsheets."},
      {"vertical": "fitness app", "hook": "Calling all people who hate the gym, this is for you."}
    ],
    "source": "https://theugcclub.com/hooks-for-ugc-content/"
  },
  {
    "name": "The #1 Mistake",
    "family": "Negativity/Warning",
    "trigger": "Loss aversion — fear of doing it wrong",
    "template": "The #1 mistake [AUDIENCE] make with [TOPIC].",
    "why_it_works": "People fear making errors more than they desire gains, so they watch to avoid being wrong.",
    "examples": [
      "The #1 mistake new investors make.",
      "The biggest mistake I made starting out.",
      "Everyone makes this mistake with their skincare.",
      "The mistake that's costing you sleep every night.",
      "Don't make this mistake when buying a mattress."
    ],
    "applied_examples": [
      {"vertical": "DTC haircare", "hook": "The #1 mistake people make washing their hair."},
      {"vertical": "coaching", "hook": "The biggest pricing mistake new coaches make."}
    ],
    "source": "https://influee.co/blog/hooks"
  },
  {
    "name": "Tired of Wasting Money",
    "family": "Relatability/POV",
    "trigger": "Shared frustration plus implied relief",
    "template": "Tired of wasting money on [THING]? Same.",
    "why_it_works": "It mirrors the viewer's exact frustration and signals a solution is coming.",
    "examples": [
      "Tired of wasting money on supplements that do nothing? Same.",
      "Sick of throwing cash at ads that flop? Same.",
      "Tired of buying products that overpromise? Me too.",
      "Done wasting money on gym memberships you never use?",
      "Exhausted by skincare that breaks you out? Same here."
    ],
    "applied_examples": [
      {"vertical": "DTC supplements", "hook": "Tired of wasting money on vitamins you forget to take? Same."},
      {"vertical": "marketing tool", "hook": "Tired of paying for 6 tools that do one thing each? Same."}
    ],
    "source": "https://influee.co/blog/hooks"
  },
  {
    "name": "I Have a Confession",
    "family": "Confession",
    "trigger": "Vulnerability triggers intimacy and curiosity",
    "template": "I have a confession to make... [ADMISSION].",
    "why_it_works": "An admission feels private and unfiltered, pulling the viewer in as a confidant.",
    "examples": [
      "I have a confession to make...",
      "Please don't judge me, but...",
      "I can't believe I'm saying this, but...",
      "Okay, I've never told anyone this...",
      "Confession: I was completely wrong about this."

    "applied_examples": [
      {"vertical": "DTC beauty", "hook": "Confession: I hadn't washed my makeup brushes in a year."},
      {"vertical": "finance app", "hook": "I have a confession... I had no idea where my money went each month."}

    "source": "https://influee.co/blog/hooks"
  },
  {
    "name": "Honest Review After Time",
    "family": "Authority/Credibility",
    "trigger": "Long-term testing signals trustworthy verdict",
    "template": "An honest review of [PRODUCT] after [TIME] of use.",
    "why_it_works": "A duration-based verdict reads as earned, unbiased experience rather than a paid plug.",
    "examples": [
      "An honest review of this after 6 months of daily use.",
      "I used this every day for a year — here's the truth.",
      "Unbiased review of the viral [product] after 30 days.",
      "What 90 days with this actually did.",
      "My honest thoughts after wearing these for a month."

    "applied_examples": [
      {"vertical": "DTC footwear", "hook": "Honest review of these 'walk all day' shoes after 60 days."},
      {"vertical": "SaaS", "hook": "An honest review of this CRM after running my agency on it for a year."}

  },
  {
    "name": "What I Wish I Knew",
    "family": "How-To/Mechanism",
    "trigger": "Promise of shortcut around painful learning curve",
    "template": "Here's what I wish I knew before [DOING THING].",
    "why_it_works": "It promises hard-won lessons that let the viewer skip the mistakes themselves.",
    "examples": [

    "source": "https://influee.co/blog/hooks"
  },
  {
    "name": "Trying the Viral",

    "trigger": "Bandwagon curiosity plus skeptic verification",
    "template": "Trying the viral [PRODUCT] so you don't have to.",

    "examples": [
      "Trying the viral leggings everyone's obsessed with.",

      "Everyone's talking about this — so I bought it.",

    "applied_examples": [
      {"vertical": "DTC kitchen", "hook": "Trying the viral $40 chopper so you don't have to."},
      {"vertical": "beauty", "hook": "Testing the viral lip oil everyone's sold out of."}
    ],
    "source": "https://theugcclub.com/hooks-for-ugc-content/"
  },
  {
    "name": "Unpopular Opinion",
    "family": "Contrarian/Myth-Bust",
    "trigger": "Conflict and taboo provoke engagement",
    "template": "Unpopular opinion: [CONTRARIAN TAKE].",
    "why_it_works": "Stating a stance against the grain sparks debate and signals the take is non-obvious.",
    "examples": [
      "Unpopular opinion: expensive skincare is a scam.",
      "Hot take: you don't need 8 glasses of water a day.",
      "Controversial, but here goes...",

    "applied_examples": [
      {"vertical": "B2B SaaS", "hook": "Unpopular opinion: most dashboards are a waste of money."},
      {"vertical": "fitness", "hook": "Unpopular opinion: cardio is overrated for fat loss."}
    ],
    "source": "https://theugcclub.com/hooks-for-ugc-content/"
  },
  {
    "name": "Stop Doing X",
    "family": "Negativity/Warning",
    "trigger": "Pattern interrupt by commanding a halt",
    "template": "Stop doing [COMMON BEHAVIOR] if you want [DESIRED OUTCOME].",
    "why_it_works": "A blunt command interrupts autopilot and ties the behavior change to a payoff.",
    "examples": [

      "Stop washing your face with hot water.",
      "Stop drinking coffee first thing if you want energy.",

      {"vertical": "DTC skincare", "hook": "Stop using face wipes if you want clear skin."},
      {"vertical": "agency", "hook": "Stop boosting posts if you want real ad results."}

    "source": "https://influee.co/blog/hooks"
  },
  {
    "name": "Don't Buy Until",
    "family": "Negativity/Warning",
    "trigger": "Loss aversion plus implied insider gatekeeping",

  {
    "name": "X vs Y Comparison",

    "template": "[OPTION A] vs [OPTION B] — here's the winner.",

    "name": "Still Using X?",

  {
    "name": "The Provocative Question",
```
